title: Create Colony
body:
![Create Colony Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9cebddc756612b4e689da71b18a69f9b46e4866.png)

📃 About This Modpack:

Create Colony is a modpack that combines the powerful automation of Create with the immersive colony-building of MineColonies. This modpack offers a gameplay experience where you can automate production, manage a growing population, and explore a world full of life and detail. With popular addons for both Create and MineColonies, Alex’s Mobs, Biomes o' Plenty and several performance mods included.
 

📁 Modpack Contents:

Main Mods: - Create - Aesthetic Technology that empowers the Player. - Create: Steam 'n' Rails - Adding depth to Create's rail network & steam system. - Create Crafts & Additions - Create Crafts & Additions extends Create and acts as a bridge between electricity and kinetic energy. - Create: Copycats+ - All the copycats you've ever wanted, combined into a single mod. - Create Slice & Dice - Making automation for Farmers Delight more sensible. - Create Deco - Industrial decoration themed around the aesthetics of the Create mod.
- Create: Structures - Add-on for Create that implements naturally generating structures containing early-game Create contraptions and items. - Create Big Cannons - A Minecraft mod for building large cannons with the Create mod. - Create: New Age - An addon for the Create mod that adds integration with electricity. - Create Goggles - Adds Goggle Helmets and Armored Backtanks for Create Mod. - Create: Bells & Whistles - Additions and adornments for the modern Create engineer. - Create: Interiors - A complement to the Create mod that adds new furniture. - Create: Enchantment Industry - Automatic Enchanting, with Create. - And many more Create Addons. - Alex's Mobs - 85+ New mobs with stylistic quality above the default game. - Biomes O' Plenty - Adds 50+ unique biomes to enhance your world, with new trees, flowers, and more. - MineColonies and some Addons. - AppleSkin - Food/hunger-related HUD improvements. - Carry On - Carry On allows you to pick up Tile Entities and Mobs and carry them around. - Comforts - Adds sleeping bags and hammocks for, respectively, portability and turning day to night, without setting new spawns. - Corpse - Never lose your items again. - Chipped - Every block deserves a friend. - Lootr - All loot chests are instanced per player and visually unique. - Rechiseled - Allows you to chisel blocks into various decorative blocks with connected textures. - Rechiseled: Create - Adds new decorative variants of blocks in Create. - Quark - This mod is a collection of small things. - Nature's Compass - Allows you to locate biomes anywhere in the world. - Explorer's Compass - Allows you to locate structures anywhere in the world. - More Mob Variants - Adds new variants to existing mobs. - Sophisticated Backpacks - Yet another backpack mod this time with backpack you can place in world, color in different color combinations, upgrade with more inventory, etc. - Simple Voice Chat - A working voice chat in Minecraft. - Xaero's Minimap - Displays a map of the nearby world terrain, players, mobs, entities in the corner of your screen. - Xenon - A Forge port of the Sodium performance mod. - FerriteCore - Memory usage optimizations. - Entity Culling - Using async path-tracing to hide Block-/Entities that are not visible. - And many more Perfomance Mods. Main Resourcepacks: - Tom's Create Storage (not enabled by default) - Create Styled Tom's Simple Storage. (More Immersive) - Create Style Sophisticated Backpacks (not enabled by default) - Sophisticated Backpacks but Creatified. (More Immersive)
Shaderpacks: - Aurora's Shaders (not enabled by default) - Recommended shaderpack. - Complementary Shaders - Reimagined (not enabled by default) - Recommended shaderpack.

💻 System Requirements

- Minimum RAM: It is recommended that you have 4GB allocated  

Mods that need to be in the description

- Cosmetic Armor Reworked: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked) - Create Compact Exp: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-compact-exp](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-compact-exp) - Create Recycle Everything: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-recycle-everything](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-recycle-everything)
